MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Dismissal Order Pursuant To Crc 3.770; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; Declaration Of Bryan Caforio In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF MAXINE DERINGTON'S Motion For Dismissal Order Pursuant To CRC 3.770 is granted. The action shall be dismissed in its entirety without prejudice.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
